title: Tragacantha lessertioides

Astragalus gummifer is a shrubby plant native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. The health benefits of Astragalus gummifer include its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which may aid in reducing stress and improving cardiovascular health.

The bioactive constituents of Astragalus gummifer include gum tragacanth, which is a complex mixture of polysaccharides, and flavonoids such as isorhapontigenin and astragalin.

Astragalus gummifer is used in herbal preparations such as capsules, tablets, and teas. It is also used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions, including respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders.
